text.div:
This value set includes codes based on the following rules:

  • Include these codes as defined in https://fhir.dk.swisstph-mis.ch/matchbox/fhir/CodeSystem/emcare-custom-codes
    CodeDisplay
    EmCare.A.DE01Universal ID
    EmCare.A.DE02Auto-generated ID
    EmCare.A.DE03Unknown ID

This value set excludes codes based on the following rules:

  • Exclude all codes defined in http://hl7.org/fhir/ValueSet/identifier-type

name: valueset-identification-type
title: Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth
description: Codes representing possible values for the Provide an estimated age or estimated date of birth element

designation.value: Unique identifier provided or a universal ID, if used in the country
Auto-generated unique identification if used by the implementation
The client's identity is unknown or the client's prefers to remain anonymous
